text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide I want to see a movie on the weekend. At the theater, I run
into someone else who has the same idea.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Oh. Hello, Trainer. I gather you're also here to see Dawn of the Umamusume: The Untrodden Chronicles.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hm? Is that to say you haven't heard of it?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Dawn of the Umamusume is a series of biographical films that chronicles the careers of various Umamusume racers.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I'll admit, they jazz it up for the screen, but they do an excellent job
showing the racers' passions and internal struggles.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The series may hold new insights for you as a trainer, too. I
recommend watching it if you have a chance.
choice_data_list:
Ooh, I think I know what I'm watching today,
then.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Ah! I'm glad to hear it's piqued your interest!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Why don't we watch it together? Hehe, let me know your thoughts
afterward!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The lights in the theater go down and the movie begins.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: The struggle of getting past an injury, the miraculous comeback...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Not everyone could make such a splendid rebound, but I think we all
can relate to the hardships she faced.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Symboli Rudolf said, the movie did give me a lot of insight as a
trainer.
choice_data_list: I feel like I learned a lot!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Haha, me too. I'm glad you liked the film as much as I did.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I'm confident you'll like the other titles in the series too. If you want, I
can let you borrow my copies.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
There, do you see that poster? I knew it was today! I've been waiting
ages for this to come out!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Oh my gosh! And we get to see it on the first day! ♪ Sigh... My heart's already racing! I'm ready to swoon!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hm? Academy students? Their dedication to seeing Dawn of the Umamusume on opening day is commendable.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
What a curious comment, though. I didn't realize there was a
swoonworthy aspect to the film...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looking around the theater, I spot a poster for another movie that's
opening today—a romance title.
choice_data_list: Maybe they're talking about this movie?
Maybe they're talking about this movie?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hmm, let's see... First Love is Sweeter than Carrot Cake?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Judging by the poster, it seems like a tale of young love. Could this
be what's popular amongst the students?
choice_data_list: Wanna give this a go as well?
Wanna give this a go as well?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Uh... I don't mind, but why?
choice_data_list:
Having similar hobbies makes it easier to strike
up a conversation.

Having similar hobbies makes it easier to strike
up a conversation.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: You have a point.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Having something in common would make for a fine conversation starter. And it's easier to relate to someone who shares your interests.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Yes... It's not just my personality that's creating the gap between
myself and everyone else. My hobbies are also on the stuffy side.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
As they say, nothing ventured, nothing gained. Naught will come of
standing about and lamenting things.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Very well, let us purchase tickets! We can see where this romance
goes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The story features a couple who bond over a certain cafe's carrot
cake. They fall in love, and weather the ups and downs of their
relationship.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the standout final scene, the heroine grabs her crush as he starts to
leave, and musters the courage to tell him how she feels.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Two films in one day. What an indulgent weekend.
choice_data_list: Did you enjoy the romance movie?
Did you enjoy the romance movie?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Oh, very much.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Up to the midpoint, the story flowed at an idyllic pace as their
relationship progressed, only to hurtle full-speed toward the climax
for maximum impact.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The plot had little in the way of unexpected twists, but it depicted
the protagonist's emotional journey in great detail.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Though not especially dramatic, the script was well written. Yes, I can
understand why the students would like this film.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While I agree with Symboli Rudolf's review, I can't help but feel it
skews a little technical.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hm? I just said my thoughts on the plot, so I'm afraid you've lost me.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Oh, unless... You must mean the protagonist's unique way of
expressing her thoughts at the end.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: "It's barely autumn... and yet I'm falling for you." Hehe... "Autumn" and "falling"... I hope she never leaves his side.
choice_data_list:
I mean, did you find the characters relatable at
all?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Relatable? As in, did I see anything of myself in the protagonist's
yearnings?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I'm afraid to say, I didn't even consider watching a film from such an
aspect.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I suppose one could put themself in the protagonist's shoes and
experience a vicarious romantic thrill...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Actually... that's how most people would experience the film, isn't it?
That must be why students tend to enjoy these kinds of stories.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Next time, I'll keep an eye out for immersive theming. I'm bound to
pick up something that helps bridge the gap between me and the
others.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I've learned another lesson thanks to you. Your point of view is
truly enlightening.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After spending a fruitful day with Symboli "The Emperor" Rudolf, I
feel as though I understand her a little better than before.
